customerservice/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
customerservice/pom.xml.why_exists: The project property <java.version> must match the target JDK version for correct compilation and runtime behavior on JDK 21.

customerservice/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin with annotation processor paths for Lombok and MapStruct.
customerservice/pom.xml.why_exists: Without annotation processor paths, MapStruct and Lombok annotations will not be processed during compilation, leading to missing generated code or compile errors.

customerservice/src/main/java/com/etiyac.general_idea: Add import for java.util.List to support the new List field.
customerservice/src/main/java/com/etiyac.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class List
